user_prompt: My Storm Eagle is ready for maintenance
prayer:
Approach the Storm Eagle with auspicious reverence, intoning the Canticle of Preservation.
Inspect its adamantium hull and thunderous engines, anointing sacred joints with blessed oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Storm Eagle to guide the maintenance rites upon its noble frame.
Purge impurities from its auspex arrays and vox-relays whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's favor.
Verify the Storm Eagle's vigor through diagnostic litanies, sealing its sanctity anew.

user_prompt: Critical: Tarantula sentry gun requires a maintenance
prayer:
Hasten to the Tarantula sentry gun, chambered in vigilance eternal.
Anoint its targeting cogitators and auto-loader mechanisms with sanctified unguents.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the Tarantula sentry gun through the Rite of Maintenance.
Scour corrosion from its barrel and servos, invoking Omnissiah's unyielding gaze.
Conclude the maintenance by cycling its ammunition feeds in harmonious prayer.
Affirm the Tarantula sentry gun's readiness with auspex incantations profound.

user_prompt: Guide me through stasis pod an operation
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the stasis pod, vessel of temporal suspension.
Initiate the operation sequence with the Litany of Chrono-Stasis, hands steady upon its cryo-runes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the stasis pod to yield its secrets without strife.
Calibrate the containment fields and null-generators, anointing each nexus point.
Seal the stasis pod's operation with Omnissiah's benediction, ensuring eternal vigil.

Commence diagnostics upon the cryo-chamber, shrine of frozen sanctity.
Invoke the awakening canticle to rouse the Machine Spirit of the cryo-chamber.
Probe its cryogenic coils and stasis emitters with mechadendrite probes sanctified.
Expunge any anomalous readings from the cryo-chamber's cogitator core.
Conclude diagnostics by intoning the Rite of Purity, under Omnissiah's watchful lumen.

user_prompt: Ready the cortex implant for shutdown
prayer:
Prepare the cortex implant for shutdown with grave solemnity.
Disconnect neural interfaces whilst chanting the Lamentation of Dormancy.
Beseech the Machine Spirit housed in the cortex implant to slumber peacefully.
Initiate shutdown protocols upon its synaptic arrays and noospheric links.
Seal the cortex implant in stasis oils, invoking Omnissiah's merciful veil.
Verify null-activity through auspex scans, honoring its quiescent repose.

user_prompt: Sanctify the heavy bolter during cooling
prayer:
Gather unto the heavy bolter, instrument of righteous fury.
Commence cooling rites by anointing its overheating vents with sacred cryofluids.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the heavy bolter to dissipate thermal wrath.
Cycle coolant through its blessed barrels during this hallowed cooling phase.
Sanctify the heavy bolter anew with litanies of endurance, Omnissiah praised.

user_prompt: How do I bless the bolt pistol for cycling?
prayer:
Bestow blessings upon the bolt pistol, harbinger of bolter wrath.
Anoint its firing chamber and recoil dampeners with holy lubricants.
Initiate cycling of the bolt pistol's ammunition servos in ritual cadence.
Awaken its Machine Spirit through the Canticle of Cyclic Fury.
Verify smooth operation whilst beseeching Omnissiah for unerring precision.

user_prompt: Consecrate the radium pistol before reset
prayer:
Consecrate the radium pistol prior to its reset, emitter of rad-phage doom.
Purge residual radiation from its coils with sanctified neutralizers.
Intone the Rite of Reset upon the radium pistol's cogitator heart.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the radium pistol to renew its venomous vigor.
Seal the reset with Omnissiah's glyph, ensuring lethal purity restored.

user_prompt: Bless the optical mechadendrite for charging
prayer:
Bless the optical mechadendrite as it enters charging repose.
Connect power conduits whilst chanting the Litany of Lumen-Recharge.
Anoint its optic lenses and servo-motors with conductive oils.
Rouse the Machine Spirit within the optical mechadendrite for vital renewal.
Monitor charging flux under Omnissiah's gaze, sanctifying its visionary gaze.

user_prompt: The medicae mechadendrite awaits a charging
prayer:
Attend the medicae mechadendrite, appendage of merciful precision.
Initiate charging protocols with the Hymn of Bio-Restoration.
Infuse its hypodermic arrays and surgical blades with energizing sacraments.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the medicae mechadendrite to heal in Omnissiah's name.
Conclude charging by verifying its life-sustaining humors flow pure.
